about_body: Digitize your transfer operations: create transfers, track status, and manage agents and distributors with reporting — in one secure dashboard.
admin_agent_detail_note_requests_api: Admin requests from this agent’s users and transfers.
admin_agent_detail_note_users_list: Users assigned to this agent (from the admin user list).
admin_agent_detail_balance_history_note: Admin credits and debits for this agent (who, when, notes).
admin_agent_detail_note_balance_demo: Breakdown is demo; the top card shows the API balance.
admin_agent_detail_stats_demo_blurb: Demo metrics and charts — replace with API when ready.
admin_agent_detail_by_state_tooltip: Transfer count by state (demo) — hover for volume
admin_agent_detail_outcome_mix_desc: Paid vs cancelled vs pending vs on hold
admin_agent_detail_by_state_desc: Transfer count and volume by destination state.
admin_dashboard_description: Overview of your HANPAY admin panel
admin_dashboard_error: Failed to load dashboard. Ensure the backend exposes GET /api/dashboard/admin.
admin_dist_detail_edit_hint: Edit name, state, or activation from the main Distributors list. Assign users from the Users tab or global Assignments on the Users page.
admin_dist_detail_note_users_list: Users assigned to this distributor (from the admin user list).
admin_dist_detail_balance_history_note: Admin credits and debits for this distributor (who, when, notes).
admin_dist_detail_prim_no_package: No premium package is assigned to this distributor.
admin_dist_detail_note_requests_api: Admin requests from this distributor’s users and transfers.
admin_dist_detail_note_transfers_api: Transfers assigned to or completed by this distributor.
admin_dist_detail_prim_from_api: Premium list from the distributor API.
admin_dist_detail_prim_from_transfers: Premium amounts computed from paid transfers and package brackets.
admin_dist_detail_prim_package_inactive_: This package is inactive in the catalog but still shown for reference.
admin_states_description: Manage destination states used in transfers.
admin_states_search_placeholder: Search by state name or code...
admin_reports_placeholder: System report modules are ready for integration with backend report endpoints.
admin_reports_description: Financial and operational reports for HANPAY.
admin_reports_card_transfers_desc: Slim transfer report for the selected date range.
admin_reports_search_placeholder: Search by receiver name or phone…
agent_reports_transfer_description: Transfers in your scope — filter by date, search the table, or export to Excel.
distributor_reports_transfer_description: Transfers in your distributor scope — filter by date or export to Excel.
admin_settings_description: Configure global transfer options. Changes apply to new transfers after save.
admin_settings_min_usd_hint: Lower bound for the transfer amount in US dollars.
admin_settings_receipt_section_desc: How long distributor-uploaded receipt files are kept on disk.
admin_settings_receipt_retention_hint: 0 = unlimited. Expired files are deleted from disk; transfer records remain.
admin_settings_receipt_retention_invalid: Enter a valid non-negative whole number.
admin_requests_action_reassign: Move to another state (back to pool)
admin_requests_commission_refund: Refund commission to agent (reverse central cashbox)
cancel_request_reason_placeholder: Describe why this transfer should be cancelled…
toast_cancellation_request_ok_history: Cancellation request submitted. You can view it under transfer history.
admin_roles_card_subtitle: This section explains what each role can do at a business level.
admin_roles_load_error: Failed to load permissions matrix. Ensure you have the required permission.
admin_roles_empty: No roles or permissions data available.
admin_roles_description: View and edit role permissions. Changes take effect after users sign in again.
admin_roles_relogin_hint: Permission changes apply on the next sign-in.
perm_distributor_transfers_read_mine: Can view own claimed distributor transfers
perm_distributor_primPackage_read: Can view prim packages and prim records
admin_transfers_cancel_description: This action will cancel the transfer and refund the agent balance.
admin_transfers_description: Pick a date range and search; filter by transfer number and status
transfer_filter_custom_hint: Choose a valid start and end date.
admin_users_description: Manage all users across agents and distributors.
admin_states_empty_hint: If the list is empty, states should be defined in backend (API/seed).
admin_distributor_delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this distributor? Deleted distributors are removed from the list.
admin_agent_delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this agent? Deleted agents are removed from the list.
admin_users_assignments_search_placehold: Search by name, email, role, agent, distributor...
admin_users_search_start_typing: Start typing; matching users appear here. Click a row to select.
admin_users_search_no_match: No users match. Try another term or disable only unassigned.
admin_users_role_not_assignable: This role is not assigned to an agent or distributor.
admin_users_no_agents_loaded: No agents loaded. Check the API or create an agent first.
admin_users_no_distributors_loaded: No distributors loaded. Check the API or create a distributor first.
admin_users_assign_after_create_hint: Please assign the user from the Assignments tab.
admin_user_detail_delete_desc: This will permanently remove {email} from the system. This action cannot be undone.
admin_agent_users_desc: Manage users for {code}. Assign existing users.
agent_balance_description: Track your monthly balance activity, credit limit, and transfers you created.
agent_balance_credit_limit_hint: Your balance can go negative by this amount.
agent_balance_available_hint: Current balance + credit limit: the total you can still spend on new transfers.
agent_balance_cancelled_transfer_hint: Deduction when the transfer was created; refunds after cancellation are in the deposits column.
agent_balance_ledger_empty: No movements recorded for this month.
agent_balance_opening_hint: Net of all balance movements before the 1st of this month.
agent_balance_list_period_close_hint: Brought forward + this month's deposits − the total shown in your transfers list for this month. Cancellation refunds appear in the deposits column; manual admin debits are not listed here.
agent_dashboard_chart_monthly_desc: Transfer amounts over the last 6 months
agent_dashboard_subtitle: Overview of your transfer activity and performance
agent_transfer_history_description: View and manage all your transfers
agent_users_description: Manage users working under your agent organization.
dist_balance_ledger_empty: No movements recorded for this month.
dist_balance_opening_hint: Net of all balance movements before the 1st of this month.
dist_balance_list_period_close_hint: Brought forward + this month’s deposits − this month’s transfers. Admin debits in the month are not in these columns.
dist_dashboard_description: Track incoming and paid transfer operations.
dist_history_description: Paid, cancelled, and transfers with a pending cancellation request.
dist_cancellation_pending_hint: Your cancellation request is awaiting admin review. No further actions are available.
dist_transfers_filter_empty: No transfers match the selected status filter. If you submitted a cancellation request, try All or Cancellation requested.
admin_prim_packages_empty_hint: No active prim packages to assign. Create one first.
hero_subtitle: Transfer tracking, balances, and reporting for agents and distributors in one platform.
landing_hero_body: Join the HanPay network as an agent or distributor. Run every step of global money transfers — creation, balance, and reporting — from a single secure console.
landing_features_heading: Every operation in a single panel
landing_features_sub: Run every step from transfer creation to reporting on one platform.
landing_feature1_body: Open transfer records and follow status in real time.
landing_feature2_body: Reconcile cash and bank items with statements in one click.
landing_feature3_body: Centralize users, permissions, commission packages, and state setup.
landing_feature4_body: Measure operations transparently with daily / weekly / monthly reports.
landing_final_heading: Join the HanPay network as an agent or distributor
landing_final_body: Become part of our global money transfer network; manage transfers, balances, and reports from a single panel. Existing partners can sign in to continue.
landing_roles_heading: A tailored console for every role
landing_contact_sub: Fill in the form to join the HanPay network as an agent or distributor, or to request a demo. We reply within 24 hours.
landing_contact_form_message_placeholder: Briefly tell us what you need…
landing_contact_form_success_body: Our team will get back to you shortly. Thanks!
landing_contact_form_error_required: Please fill in the required fields.
landing_contact_form_error_email: Please enter a valid email address.
landing_role_agent_body: Transfer creation, recipient verification, and balance tracking.
landing_role_distributor_body: Incoming transfer flow, payout, and reconciliation control.
landing_role_admin_body: Agents, distributors, commission packages, and system reports.
profile_security_section_desc: Change your password. You will stay signed in on this device with a new token.
notification.cancellation_request_opened: Click to review the pending request.
notification.agent_balance_depleted.mess: New transfers may be blocked; top up the balance.
notification.distributor_balance_deplete: Distributor may be unable to pay new transfers; top up the balance.
notification.transfer_claimed.message: The distributor has claimed this transfer.
notification.transfer_paid.message: Amount: {amount} USD. You may notify the customer.
notification.agent_balance_credited: Your agent balance was credited with {amount} USD
notification.agent_low_balance_warning.m: Current balance: {balance} USD. Top up before new transfers.
notification.new_transfer_in_state.messa: Open the pool to claim it.
notification.transfer_reassigned_to_othe: This transfer is no longer in your state.
notification.distributor_low_balance_war: Current balance: {balance} USD. Ask your manager to top up.
login_subtitle: Enter your details to access your account
login_security_note: You sign in to your account through a secure connection.
insights_monthly_volume_subtitle: Monthly paid-transfer volume totals (USD). Use the period selector below to change the range.
insights_monthly_volume_chart_desc: Monthly transfer amounts for the selected period (USD).
insights_monthly_volume_table_desc: Volume and transfer counts for each month in the selected period.
insights_statistics_subtitle: Paid transfers only. Default period is the last 6 months; you can expand to 12 months below.
insights_statistics_payment_desc: Cash vs bank breakdown in USD and TRY.
phone_api_error_invalid_tr: Phone number is not a valid Turkey number. Enter a valid 10-digit number (e.g. 555 123 45 67).
phone_api_error_invalid_tm: Phone number is not a valid Turkmenistan number. Enter a valid 8-digit number (e.g. 61 234 567).
transfer_api_error_receiver_phone_invali: Receiver phone is not a valid Turkey number. Enter a valid 10-digit number (e.g. 555 123 45 67).
Receiver phone is not a valid Turkmenistan number. Enter a valid 8-digit number (e.g. 61 234 567).
transfer_api_error_sender_phone_invalid_: Sender phone is not a valid Turkey number. Enter a valid 10-digit number (e.g. 555 123 45 67).
Sender phone is not a valid Turkmenistan number. Enter a valid 8-digit number (e.g. 61 234 567).
transfer_next_blocked_receiver_phone: Complete the receiver phone for the selected country.
transfer_next_blocked_phone: Complete sender and receiver phones for the selected country.
toast_agent_created_desc: Add users from the agent's Users page.
toast_create_transfer_failed_desc: Request body is invalid. Check transfer fields.
toast_password_rule_special: at least one special character (@, #, !, etc.)
toast_login_failed_description: Sign-in failed. Incorrect email or password.
toast_reset_success_desc: You can now login with your new password.
toast_summary_invalid_usd_desc: USD Amount must be greater than 0.
toast_summary_not_ready_desc: Wait for the quote to finish loading.
toast_min_transfer_update_failed: Could not update minimum transfer amount
toast_receipt_retention_update_failed: Could not update receipt retention period
toast_transfer_state_required: Please choose a valid state from the list.
transfer_exchange_hint: Edit to preview TL; prefilled from server quote when available
transfer_edit_forbidden: You do not have permission to edit this transfer.
transfer_edit_no_permission: You do not have permission to edit transfers. You may need to sign in again.
transfer_edit_confirm_default: Are you sure you want to update this transfer?
transfer_edit_confirm_amount_changed: Amount or payment details changed. Are you sure you want to save?
transfer_next_blocked_loading: Please wait while the request finishes.
transfer_next_blocked_rate: Enter your exchange rate to continue.
transfer_next_blocked_summary: Wait for the summary to load.
transfer_receipt_draft_notice: Preview: saved after “Create transfer”. Print or PDF for signatures.
transfer_receipt_confirmed_notice: Transfer saved. The number below is the official transfer number; print and PDF use it.
transfer_receipt_legal_notice: This e-Receipt has been generated electronically and constitutes an original document.
toast_receipt_download_failed: Could not generate PDF. Try print and save as PDF.
transfer_validation_required_fields: Fill in all sender and receiver fields and amounts, then wait for the summary to load.
validation_email_already_registered: This email address is already registered.
validation_email_invalid: Enter a valid email address (e.g. name@company.com).
validation_password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation_password_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
validation_password_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
validation_password_digit: Password must contain at least one digit.
validation_password_special: Password must contain at least one special character (@, #, !, etc.).
validation_agent_code_alphanumeric: Agent code may only contain letters and numbers; special characters are not allowed.
admin_state_delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this state? Existing records linked to this state may prevent deletion.
agent_transfer_history_empty_hint: Create your first transfer from the Create Transfer page.
notification_distributor_released: {number}: Claim released; transfer is pending again.
dist_confirm_cancel_pending: This pending transfer will be cancelled and the agent balance refunded. Continue?
dist_confirm_release_claim: Release your claim and return this transfer to the pool?
admin_prim_records_description: Period-based prim deductions and reversals for all distributors.
admin_prim_records_search_placeholder: Search transfer no, distributor or amount…
admin_prim_packages_description: Create and manage prim packages with tiered brackets for distributors.
prim_pkg_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this prim package? Distributors using this package may be affected.
dist_prims_description: Premiums deducted from paid transfers. Reversed when a paid transfer is cancelled.
api_error_access_denied_description: You do not have permission to perform this action.
api_error_server_description: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
api_errors_VALIDATION_FAILED: Please check the form fields and try again.
api_errors_LOGIN_INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Sign-in failed. Incorrect email or password.
api_errors_LOGIN_ACCOUNT_INACTIVE: Your account is inactive. Please contact your administrator.
api_errors_LOGIN_ACCOUNT_LOCKED_OUT: Too many failed login attempts. Please try again later.
api_errors_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
api_errors_SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
api_errors_AGENT_CREDIT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Agent credit limit exceeded. Available limit: {available} USD (configured limit: {limit} USD).
api_errors_MINIMUM_TRANSFER_AMOUNT_NOT_M: The transfer amount is below the minimum allowed amount.
api_errors_AGENT_EXCHANGE_RATE_NOT_SET: Agent USD/TRY exchange rate is not set.
api_errors_PAYMENT_MISMATCH: Payment total does not match the transfer total.
api_errors_TRANSFER_CANNOT_BE_UPDATED: This transfer cannot be updated (cancelled, frozen, or cancellation pending).
api_errors_DISTRIBUTOR_NOT_ASSIGNED: User is not assigned to a distributor.
api_errors_AGENT_NOT_ASSIGNED: User is not assigned to an agent.
api_errors_COMMISSION_PACKAGE_INACTIVE: Commission package was not found or is inactive.
api_errors_DUPLICATE_COMMISSION_PACKAGE_: A commission package with this name already exists.
api_errors_TRANSFER_ALREADY_CLAIMED: This transfer has already been claimed by another distributor.
api_errors_TRANSFER_NOT_PENDING: This transfer is no longer pending.
api_errors_INVALID_FILE_TYPE: This file type is not allowed.
api_errors_NOT_FOUND: The requested record was not found.
api_errors_EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: This email address is already registered.
cashbox_description: Track the central cashbox and admin/assistant admin user cashboxes.
transfer_commissions_description: Commission collected from agents when transfers are created. Does not affect central cashbox balance; for reporting only.
central_cashbox_description: Agent balance loads entering the system and distributor paid outflows.
centralCashbox.netAssetFormula: Net system asset = Central cashbox + Agent receivables − Agent payables + Distributor receivables − Distributor payables
centralCashbox.receivablesUnavailable: Receivables summary is only available in the central cashbox view.
user_cashbox_description: Review admin and assistant admin user cashboxes one by one.
cashbox_central_section_desc: Agent balance loads and distributor paid movements.
cashbox_user_section_desc: Inflow and outflow accounts for admin and assistant admin users.
cashbox_opening_hint: Previous UTC day closing; today's carry-forward opening.
cashbox_opening_hint_user: Derived opening balance from the movements shown in the list.
cashbox_list_balance_hint: Carry-over + inflows − outflows. Should match current central cashbox balance (commission excluded).
cashbox_list_balance_hint_user: Opening + inflows − outflows. Should match current balance.
cashbox_user_ledger_empty: There are no movements listed for this cashbox right now.
cashbox_user_ledger_filtered_empty: No movements in the selected date range.
cashbox_ledger_invalid_date: Enter a valid start or end date.
cashbox_ledger_invalid_range: Start date cannot be after the end date.
cashbox_source_user_external_credit: External source — credit to user cashbox
cashbox_source_user_external_debit: External source — debit from user cashbox
cashbox_source_user_central_credit: From central — credit to user cashbox
cashbox_source_user_central_debit: To central — debit from user cashbox
cashbox_source_central_external_credit: External source — credit to central cashbox
cashbox_source_central_external_debit: External source — debit from central cashbox
cashbox_manual_section_hint: Affects only the central balance; user cashboxes are unchanged.
cashbox_user_manual_section_hint: Credits Admin/AssistantAdmin user cashboxes from an external source; the central cashbox is updated as well.
cashbox_sidebar_commission_hint: Net commission amount returned by backend (earned - reversed).
cashbox_sidebar_commission_filtered_hint: Sum of commissions shown in the date range filter above.
cashbox_commission_section_hint: Commission collected from agents on transfers. Does not affect central cashbox balance; for reporting only.
mobile_coming_soon_body: This screen will be added in the next step.
mobile_admin_ops_intro: Quick access to common admin operations.
